NearStars · 보고서Reports · 방법론Methodology · Phase 4 · alpha_centauri · Alpha Centauri B · Phase 3 합성 ↗Phase 3 synthesis ↗

Alpha Centauri B

9 결정decisions · 5 gated · 0 divergence
environment.activity 통과Passthrough

K1V·더 활동적. P_rot 41±3d·log R'HK −4.85·clean 8.84yr cycle(DeWarf2010, 최고급)·X선 log Lx 27.04, min-to-peak contrast ~4.5(태양 진폭의 절반). radiation_surface ≈1.4 (A의 ~2배 — Lx 비 1.8 정합, 단 플레어성 아님). 측정 emit 그대로. [2026-07-12 점검: P_rot 38→41d·R'HK −5.0→−4.85(DB recommended), factor~10은 A의 특성이라 제거 — 교정 후에야 "B 더 활동적" 서사와 수치가 정합.]
K1V·more active. P_rot 41±3d·log R'HK −4.85·clean 8.84yr cycle (DeWarf2010, top-grade)·X-ray log Lx 27.04, min-to-peak contrast ~4.5 (half the solar amplitude). radiation_surface ≈1.4 (~2× A — consistent with the Lx ratio 1.8, but not flare-active). Measured, emitted as-is. [2026-07-12 review: P_rot 38→41d·R'HK −5.0→−4.85 (DB recommended), the factor~10 removed as it is A's property — only after the correction do the numbers agree with the "B more active" narrative.]

필드Field값Value
activityP_rot 41d, log R'HK −4.85, clean 8.84yr cycle (DeWarf2010), X-ray log Lx 27.04 (contrast ~4.5)passthrough
2010ApJ...722..343D2016A&A...596A..52R
magnetism.magnetic_field 확정Gated범위 내In-window

대규모 표면장 ~2–4 G (A보다 강함). K1V는 τ_conv 길어 Rossby≈1.4<A → 더 효율적 dynamo(clean 8.84yr cycle의 정연한 주기성 + X선 A보다 밝음이 방증). A의 ~1.5–2배. 직접 ZDI 없음 → proxy(low–med). ZDI pull 시 상향 가능. [2026-07-12 점검: "factor~10 modulation" 방증은 A의 특성이라 clean cycle 방증으로 교체.]
Large-scale surface field ~2–4 G (stronger than A). K1V has a longer τ_conv, Rossby≈1.4<A → a more efficient dynamo (corroborated by the orderly periodicity of the clean 8.84yr cycle + brighter X-ray than A). ~1.5–2× A. No direct ZDI → proxy (low–med). Could be revised upward on a ZDI pull. [2026-07-12 review: the "factor~10 modulation" corroboration was A's property, replaced with the clean-cycle corroboration.]

필드Field값Value
magnetic_field~2–4 G (large-scale surface, A보다 강함)
evidence K1V는 τ_conv 길어 Rossby≈1.4<A → 더 효율적 dynamo(clean 8.84yr cycle 주기성 + X선 log Lx 27.04 > A 26.78 방증). A의 ~1.5–2배. 직접 ZDI 없음 → proxy(low–med).
K1V has a longer τ_conv, Rossby≈1.4<A → a more efficient dynamo (corroborated by the clean 8.84yr cycle periodicity + X-ray log Lx 27.04 > A 26.78). ~1.5–2× A. No direct ZDI → proxy (low–med).
2010ApJ...722..343D
environment.stellar_wind 대체됨Superseded

[SUPERSEDED — 아래 재게이트 행이 대체함] 원안 Ṁ_B ≈ 0.6 Ṁ⊙. "더 활동적이나 절대 풍은 A보다 약함"이라는 원 논리는 스테일 X선(A가 더 밝다고 본 값)에 기댄 것 — 현 DB는 B가 X선 더 밝음(27.04 vs 26.78).
[SUPERSEDED — replaced by the re-gate row below] Original Ṁ_B ≈ 0.6 Ṁ⊙. The original logic "more active but the absolute wind is weaker than A's" leaned on stale X-ray (which held A brighter) — the current DB has B brighter in X-ray (27.04 vs 26.78).

필드Field값Value
stellar_wind0.6 Mdot_sun
Phase 3: 합산 ~2 Ṁ⊙ (Wood 2001 측정)
environment.stellar_wind 확정Gated오너 확정Owner override

Ṁ_B ≈ 1.5 Ṁ⊙ (합산 ~2 Ṁ⊙의 B 몫). Wood 2002 관계 원형대로 표면 X선 플럭스 가중(Ṁ/area ∝ F_X^1.34): B는 표면 X선 플럭스가 A의 ~3.7배(더 밝은 Lx + 더 작은 반지름) → 활동적인 K왜성답게 풍도 B가 지배. 상세 산식은 A 재게이트 행 참조. 오너-오버라이드 근거: 합산 ~2 Ṁ⊙만 측정됨(Wood 2001 공유 astrosphere); per-star 분배 A≈0.5/B≈1.5는 X선 표면플럭스 가중 가정(Wood 2002 관계)이지 직접 측정이 아님.
Ṁ_B ≈ 1.5 Ṁ⊙ (B's share of the combined ~2 Ṁ⊙). Following the Wood 2002 relation as-is, weighted by surface X-ray flux (Ṁ/area ∝ F_X^1.34): B's surface X-ray flux is ~3.7× A's (brighter Lx + smaller radius) → as befits an active K dwarf, B dominates the wind too. See the A re-gate row for the detailed derivation. Owner-override rationale: only the combined ~2 Ṁ⊙ is measured (Wood 2001 shared astrosphere); the per-star split A≈0.5/B≈1.5 is an X-ray-surface-flux-weighted assumption (Wood 2002 relation), not a direct measurement.

필드Field값Value
stellar_wind1.5 Mdot_sun
Phase 3: 합산 ~2 Ṁ⊙ (Wood 2001 측정)
evidence 현 DB X선(A 26.78 / B 27.04)·반지름(1.223/0.863 R⊙)로 F_X^1.34 가중 재계산 → Ṁ 비 B/A ≈ 2.9. 구행(B≈0.6)은 재앵커 전 스테일 X선 기반이라 역전돼 있었음.
Recomputed with F_X^1.34 weighting from the current DB X-ray (A 26.78 / B 27.04)·radii (1.223/0.863 R⊙) → Ṁ ratio B/A ≈ 2.9. The old row (B≈0.6) was reversed because it was based on pre-reanchor stale X-ray.
2001ApJ...547L..49W2002ApJ...574..412W2016A&A...596A..52R2010ApJ...722..343D
appearance 확정Gated범위 내In-window

color=K1V, Teff 5316K → 황등(yellow-orange, sRGB ~#ffdcb0). granulation=대류 granule(약간 큼). limb_darkening=표준(적색쪽 강함). spots_faculae=보통 — 피복률 ~1–3%(A의 ~2배 활동도·clean 8.84yr cycle·X선 A보다 밝음), 중위도 흑점군 여럿(umbra+penumbra) + faculae 뚜렷. corona=A보다 밝음(log Lx 27.04 vs 26.78). flares=가끔(A보다 활동적, 단 플레어성 아님). 흑점량=오너 위임 결정(텍스처용) 보통 ~1–3%, A보다 흑점군 多. 색=K1V Teff passthrough. [2026-07-12 점검: Teff 5260→5316K(DB), factor~10 제거(A의 특성) — 색 hex는 지각 이하 차이라 유지.]
color=K1V, Teff 5316K → yellow-orange (sRGB ~#ffdcb0). granulation=convective granules (slightly larger). limb_darkening=standard (stronger toward the red). spots_faculae=moderate — coverage ~1–3% (~2× A's activity·clean 8.84yr cycle·brighter X-ray than A), several mid-latitude spot groups (umbra+penumbra) + prominent faculae. corona=brighter than A (log Lx 27.04 vs 26.78). flares=occasional (more active than A, but not flare-active). Spot count=owner-delegated decision (for texture), moderate ~1–3%, more spot groups than A. color=K1V Teff passthrough. [2026-07-12 review: Teff 5260→5316K (DB), factor~10 removed (A's property) — the color hex is a below-perception difference, kept.]

필드Field값Value
color#ffdcb0
Phase 3: K1V, Teff 5316K (황등)
granulation대류 granule (약간 큼)
limb_darkening표준 (적색쪽 강함)
spots_faculaemoderate ~1–3% 피복률, 중위도 흑점군 여럿
coronaA보다 밝음 (log Lx 27.04)
flaresoccasional (플레어성 아님)
evidence 관측 측정서 도출(Teff·X선 log Lx 27.04·DeWarf2010 8.84yr cycle). 흑점량=오너 위임 결정(텍스처용) 보통 ~1–3%, A보다 흑점군 多. 색=K1V Teff passthrough.
Derived from observed measurements (Teff·X-ray log Lx 27.04·DeWarf2010 8.84yr cycle). Spot count=owner-delegated decision (for texture), moderate ~1–3%, more spot groups than A. color=K1V Teff passthrough.
2010ApJ...722..343Ddocs/reference/stellar-photospheric-color-methodology.md
bulk.spin_axis_orientation 확정Gated범위 내In-window

i★ = 45°(+9/−19) 측정 채택(Dumusque 2014, SOAP activity/RV modeling, low-conf). 궤도 경사 ~79°와 어긋나 최소 3D 비정렬 |79−45| ≈ 34° — 스핀-궤도 비정렬이라는 흥미로운 실측 읽기(interesting-first). 극 방위각 미구속 → 궤도극과 같은 PA 채택(비정렬 최소화 읽기, 34°). ICRS 극 RA/Dec 변환은 emit 단계. 뷰어 i★ 레이어(측정=금색)와 정합.
i★ = 45° (+9/−19) measurement adopted (Dumusque 2014, SOAP activity/RV modeling, low-conf). Departing from the orbital inclination ~79°, the minimum 3D misalignment is |79−45| ≈ 34° — an interesting measured reading of spin-orbit misalignment (interesting-first). Polar azimuth unconstrained → adopt the same PA as the orbital pole (misalignment-minimizing reading, 34°). ICRS pole RA/Dec conversion is at the emit stage. Consistent with the viewer's i★ layer (measured=gold).

필드Field값Value
spin_axis_orientationi★ 45° (LOS 기준, 측정) · PA=궤도극 정렬 → 궤도면 대비 비정렬 ~34°
evidence 측정값 그대로 채택(45° +9/−19, recommended). 비정렬 자체가 측정 함의 — 가정은 방위각(최소 비정렬 읽기)뿐. 불확도 커서 low-conf 유지, 후속 측정 시 갱신 후보.
Adopts the measured value as-is (45° +9/−19, recommended). The misalignment itself is a measurement implication — the only assumption is the azimuth (minimum-misalignment reading). Kept low-conf due to the large uncertainty; a candidate for update on follow-up measurements.
2014ApJ...796..133D
bulk.geopotential_j2 확정Gated방법론 도출Methodology-derived

회전 편평 J2 = 5.7e-8. 같은 태양앵커 스케일링: q = 5.48e-6 (M 0.9373 M⊙·R 0.8632 R⊙·P_rot 41±3d) → J2 5.7e-8 (±~15%). reference_radius = 적도반경 6.005e8 m. 느린 자전+작은 반지름이라 태양의 ~1/4 — 그래도 오너 정책대로 emit. 상세 산식·정책은 A 행 및 body-figure-methodology §2 참조.
Rotational flattening J2 = 5.7e-8. Same solar-anchored scaling: q = 5.48e-6 (M 0.9373 M⊙·R 0.8632 R⊙·P_rot 41±3d) → J2 5.7e-8 (±~15%). reference_radius = equatorial radius 6.005e8 m. Slower rotation+smaller radius, so ~1/4 the Sun's — but emitted per owner policy. See the A row and body-figure-methodology §2 for the detailed derivation·policy.

필드Field값Value
geopotential_j25.7e-08
reference_radius6.005e8 m
evidence q(5.48e-6, DB recommended) × 태양 측정 J2/q(0.0105) = 5.7e-8. K1V는 태양보다 응집 약간 덜해 실제값은 소폭 위일 수 있으나(계수 상향 여지) 차수 불변 — FGK 근사 범위 내.
q (5.48e-6, DB recommended) × measured solar J2/q (0.0105) = 5.7e-8. K1V is slightly less condensed than the Sun, so the actual value may be marginally higher (room for an upward coefficient), but the order is unchanged — within the FGK approximation range.
docs/reference/body-figure-methodology.md
bulk 통과Passthrough

§3.2 앵커 — DB 측정 passthrough 에코: mass 0.9373 M⊙ · radius 0.8632 R⊙(6.005e8 m) · P_rot 41 d · age 5.3 Gyr. gravity 345 m/s² = GM/R² 파생 에코. spin_axis_orientation·geopotential_j2 (+reference_radius)는 전용 행이 담당(union rule).
§3.2 anchor — DB-measured passthrough echo: mass 0.9373 M⊙ · radius 0.8632 R⊙ (6.005e8 m) · P_rot 41 d · age 5.3 Gyr. gravity 345 m/s² = GM/R² derived echo. spin_axis_orientation·geopotential_j2 (+reference_radius) are handled by dedicated rows (union rule).

mass0.9373 M_sunpassthrough
radius0.8632 R_sunpassthrough
gravity345 m/s2
Phase 3: GM/R² 파생 에코
passthrough
flattening2.8e-06
= (3J₂+q)/2 파생 에코 (J₂ 5.7e-8, q 5.5e-6) — 시각 oblate 슬롯
rotation_period41 dpassthrough
age5.3 Gyrpassthrough

identity.discoverability 통과Passthrough

ResearchBodies 정책상 항성은 항상 가시. A와 동일.
Per ResearchBodies policy, stars are always visible. Same as A.

discoverabilityalways visible (star)passthrough
